title: Dudelange, Esch-sur-Alzette Canton — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Dudelange, Esch-sur-Alzette Canton: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Dudelange is a city in Esch-sur-Alzette Canton with a population of 22,043. A former steel town in southern Luxembourg known for its industrial heritage, the Gëlle Fra memorial, and its proximity to the French border.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
